name: asset-search-mcp
description: Standalone, search-only MCP for asset-driven Roblox game design: ranked Creator Store discovery, search cache preprocessing, per-slot curation, shared asset reviews, committed palettes, Prop Hunt validation, headless fragment assembly planning, scoped player-angle screenshot review, and playable-space visual gating. Decoupled from the Roblox Studio MCP.

scripts.test: npm run test:offline && npm run test:gate && npm run test:playable-space && npm run test:fixture && npm run test:smoke
